title: Collapse _error.ts string-prefix matches; migrate existing typed Errors to FabricError
description: Two-part error system collapse: (1) _error.ts:92-115 has 3 string-prefix matches (PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT_ROOT / HUMAN_LOCK_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND / LEDGER_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND) — replace with typed FabricError throws at the source sites (scan.ts / human-lock service / ledger services). (2) Existing 3 typed Error classes (AgentsMetaFileMissingError + AgentsMetaInvalidError at meta-reader.ts:11,20; HistoryReplayError at rehydrate-state.ts:11) change parent class to extend FabricError sub-trees + add actionHint. (3) normalizeApiError simplified to: if (e instanceof FabricError) return { status: e.httpStatus, code: e.code, message: e.message, details: e.details }.
scope: Layer 1 foundation — typed error system fully consolidated; structured warnings now AI-consumable

files.change: Remove 3 string-prefix matches at lines 92-115. Keep the AgentsMetaFileMissingError/AgentsMetaInvalidError instanceof checks (those classes now extend FabricError so instanceof FabricError covers them too — collapse to single FabricError check)
Lines 11, 20: AgentsMetaFileMissingError / AgentsMetaInvalidError change extends Error → extends FabricError appropriate sub-tree (IOFabricError); add actionHint to constructor
Line 11: HistoryReplayError extends FabricError sub-tree (IOFabricError); add actionHint
Replace `throw new Error('Path escapes project root: ...')` with `throw new PathEscapeError(...)` from shared/errors
Replace `Cannot find human lock entry:` Error throws with new RuleError throws
Replace `Cannot find ledger entry:` Error throws with new IOFabricError throws

criteria: normalizeApiError is single FabricError instanceof check; all known error codes still produce same status code (422 for ledger missing → may need explicit subclass; document in tests)
AgentsMetaFileMissingError / AgentsMetaInvalidError / HistoryReplayError constructors all require actionHint
PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT_ROOT / HUMAN_LOCK_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND / LEDGER_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND HTTP responses unchanged (status + code)
Existing tests pass; new tests added for typed throws + actionHint requirement
